title: Dasystephana forwoodii

The classification of Dasystephana forwoodii is also recognized by its botanical name, which is used universally to identify the plant. intro: Dasystephana forwoodii, also known as Forwood's dasystephana, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Dasystephana forwoodii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
